Quote.mismatchDetail: ISO '2026-xx-xx' always < YYYYMMDD '2026xxxx' (ASCII '-'=45 < '0'=48). Same-year future records NOT excluded by gate.
Quote.crossYearFiltering: CORRECT (cross-year works: '2027-...' > '2026...' due to digit comparison)
